hints.text: Plates white — often **fully white in Gen3** (strip commoner on newer/coastal cars); **HR stickers** on older cars
Bollards white w/ black rectangle + red/white reflector, **triangular from above (sharp edges)**

shared_with.note: Sometimes similar — but MK is Gen3-only.

hints.text: **Croatian**: Latin-only Slavic; **'IJE'** where Serbian uses 'E'; Č Ć Đ Š Ž

shared_with.note: Slovene has lots of J's too.

hints.text: Chevrons **red arrow on yellow or white**; direction signs **yellow w/ black outline + pencil tip** (all ex-Yugoslav countries similar)

Gen3: **side mirrors partially visible** (commonest here) — sometimes a **yellow circular sticker on the mirror = Croatia-unique**; most Gen3 = **autumn colours** (not Gen4); Gen4 black or white car, never w/ antenna; Gen2 = only downtown **trekkers** (red cap sometimes visible)
hints.uniq_note: The yellow mirror sticker is unique to Croatia; visible mirrors alone also appear elsewhere.

hints.text: Cylindrical concrete/wooden poles, wooden often w/ **alternating hooks** (≈ Latvia); **blue fire hydrants** w/ two diagonal protrusions (similar in Hungary)
Exposed **red-brick walls** inland (also SI/RS); pedestrian sign 5 stripes + belt (Slovenia's man: no belt)

hints.uniq_note: Plodine exists only in Croatia — Konzum also in Bosnia (uncovered).

hints.text: **Area codes**: 0 + code; town names ending **-ec** → northern central Croatia

**NE (Slavonia)** = flat farmland (≈ Hungary/NW-Serbia); N+W of Zagreb = hilly agriculture; **Adriatic coast** = rocky mountains + shrubs + islands (≈ ME/AL); coast houses = beige brick + green shutters (Italy-like); **Istria** = red soil + Italian bilingual signs (west)
**Zagreb**: big-city feel, hilly north, **blue trams** + Gen2 sidewalk trekkers; trams only in Zagreb & Osijek; **Rijeka**: long blue traffic-light poles over the road (exclusive)

**Spotlights**: NE of Zadar = flat + distant ridge north; **Ilok** = vineyard country near the Serbian border; **Petrinja** = earthquake ruins (2020); **Dubrovnik** = medieval city walls + tall cypresses near the southern tip
